object.name: InputRichMessageContent
object.description: Represents the content of a rich message to be sent as the result of an inline query.
object.html_description: Represents the content of a rich message to be sent as the result of an inline query.
object.rst_description: Represents the `content <https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#inputmessagecontent>`_ of a rich message to be sent as the result of an inline query.
